Patch Set 6:

It seems strange that the configure test is in lustre/autoconf/lustre-core.m4 but the get_random_u32_below() function is used in lnet and libcfs?  It would make more sense to put the autoconf check in libcfs/autoconf/lustre-libcfs.m4 in that case.

Patch Set 6: Code-Review+1

I guess it's not the end of the world, and landing the patches in this series is also important.  Please move if patch is refreshed.

parents.subject: LU-13340 lustre: Support large nids in LCFG_ADD_UUID

commit.subject: LU-16594 build: get_random_u32_below, get_acl with dentry
commit.message:
LU-16594 build: get_random_u32_below, get_acl with dentry

Linux commit v6.1-13825-g3c202d14a9d7
  prandom: remove prandom_u32_max()

Use get_random_u32_below() and provide a replacement
when get_random_u32_below is not available.

Linux commit v6.1-rc1-2-g138060ba92b3
  fs: pass dentry to set acl method
Linux commit v6.1-rc1-4-g7420332a6ff4
  fs: add new get acl method

get_acl() and set_acl() have new signatures

Test-Parameters: trivial
